title: Documentation, APIs, Licenses, and Generated-Artifact Gates · Policy Clinic: Generated Drift
summary: Keep human and machine contracts synchronized with implementation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates generated drift increment in a documentation and contract drift suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Regenerate schemas, clients, docs, and fixtures and fail on unexplained diffs.
Check dependency licenses, attribution, notices, and source obligations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Generated Drift evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-generated-drift-li9l2: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Generated Drift into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-generated-drift-li9l2:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
